goalsTracker.note: The vision board, written down so it stops living only on the wall. Reviewed at month end.

goal.title: Decide internal growth or external move
goal.detail: Talk it through with the mentor and with Taylor. Do not drift into year three by default.

goal.title: Reach communications director within five years
goal.detail: Build strategy and team-lead experience, not just execution.

goal.title: Two weeks in Lisbon and Porto with Kaitlyn
goal.detail: Per-person budget 2290. Saved 822 so far. Postcards from every city.

goal.title: Open a retirement account
goal.detail: Before my next birthday. Start at 50 a month, automate it.

goal.title: Build a one month emergency buffer
goal.detail: On top of the trip fund. Keep it boring and untouched.

goal.title: Launch the personal newsletter
goal.detail: Working title Plain Voice. Three essays drafted before the soft launch.

goal.title: Phone down by 10:30, most nights
goal.detail: Sleep fixes the rest of it. Keep the Friday thrift run and Sunday cooking.
